race.description: Illawarra Rsl Sub-Branches Provincial Maiden Hcp
race.comment: COCO DIOR (4) is busting to win and has started at short quotes placing in her last two. Comes back home following a solid effort over 1400m at Albury. Races well at the track and has been kept on the fresh side. Deserves another chance. ENTRAPMENT (10) resumes for the local Ible stable and started her last campaign in good style placing over 1300m at this track. Went close,over a mile in her two most recent. She's trailed well and has plenty of scope for improvement. Draws an outside gate but should have the early speed to manage. Feared. SONNIG (7) resumes and has switched from a Victorian barn. Lightly raced and placed in a recent trial here. Has a 1.5kg claim and maps for a soft run. Showed enough in town last time to consider. WINNING RULET (12) resumes drawn low and won't be too far away.
